Title: Requires landlords to replace a lock on a tenant's door when requested by a victim of domestic violence
Summary: Requires landlords to replace a lock on a tenant's dwelling door within 24 hours of a request by a tenant who is a victim of domestic violence; provides civil penalties for violations in relation thereto.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the real property law, in relation to requiring landlords to replace the lock on a tenant's door if requested by a tenant who is a victim of domestic violence
